examples: A zoologist attempts to capture a northern gannet affected by the oil spill.
The first known animal victim of the spill was a northern gannet, currently recovering.
Gannet - to subsist by the wings of his virtue and merit, having little land to rest upon.
His neighbors, fearing for a nearby gannet colony, took him to Environment Court.
Gannet was without her newborn calf, and observers fear the calf is dead.
